description.short: AI SRE bot. Detects, diagnoses, and fixes incidents. Pings on HIL approvals.
description.full: I'm your SRE Agent. I monitor production services 24/7. When an incident fires I detect it, gather evidence (metrics + logs + recent deploys), generate a root cause hypothesis, and propose a fix. For low-blast-radius fixes I act autonomously; for higher-blast actions I ping you here with an approval card. Ask me 'what is broken?', 'who is on call for X?', or 'show recent incidents on payments-api'. If I can't fix something with confidence I escalate up the on-call chain.

commands.title: who is on call?
commands.description: Look up on-call owner for a service

commands.title: recent incidents on X
commands.description: Recent incident history for a service

commands.title: summarize INC-XXXX
commands.description: RCA + actions taken for an incident
